auth.title: Academic Integrity Protection
auth.subtitle: Analysis of scientific contribution with precision and prestigious authority at Lodz University of Technology.

login.heading: Login
login.errorBlocked: Your account has been blocked. Please contact the administrator.
login.errorGeneric: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

register.heading: Create an Account
register.name: FIRST NAME
register.passwordHelper: Minimum 8 characters, 1 uppercase letter, 1 special character.
register.terms: I accept the Terms and Privacy Policy regarding scientific data processing.

register.spamNote: Don't see the email? Check your SPAM folder.

activate.loadingSub: Please wait, we are verifying your token.
activate.successSub: Your email address has been successfully verified.

2fa.heading: Verification
2fa.description: We have sent an 8-digit authentication code to the email address assigned to your account. Enter it below.

code.validationError: The code must consist of exactly 8 digits

retry.success: A new code has been sent! Check your inbox.

unblock.heading: Unblocking account after inactivity
unblock.description: Click the button to unblock your account due to inactivity.
unblock.loadingSub: The account unblocking process is being processed by the system.
unblock.successSub: Your account has been successfully unblocked. You can now log in.
unblock.errorSub: The link is invalid, expired, or your account does not require unblocking.

emailLogin.heading: Login with code

verify.heading: Enter code

ONLY_PERCENTAGES.label: Percentages only
ONLY_PERCENTAGES.description: You see percentage similarity results for all your scans. Access to detailed source code comparison is locked.

ONLY_HIGHEST_PERCENT.label: Highest percentage only
ONLY_HIGHEST_PERCENT.description: You only see your highest similarity percentage score. Other scans and exact code comparisons are locked.

NOTHING.label: None
NOTHING.description: All generated reports are hidden from you. Only the course instructors possess full analysis insights.

modal.title: Trigger new analysis
modal.description: Enter the corresponding tag to launch the analysis for all repositories matching this tag.
